chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-549 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For hearing of main case 2.For hearing of MA 4605/24 19-05-2025 None present for the applicants. Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, APG. **** On 12.05.2025, following order was passed: “None present for the applicants; no intimation is received; same was the position on the last two consecutive dates of hearing. Under the circumstances, this application is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however in the interest of justice adjourned to 19.05.2025. Today, none present for the applicants; no intimation is received so far, which shows that the applicants and their counsel are not interested in proceeding with this matter, Result thereof, instant Crl. Misc. Application along with listed application(s) is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
